transcript_text: I think Bitcoin is going to break above 100k in the next few months. If BTC loses 85k, I am wrong.
expected_behavior: one accepted creator-owned BTC bullish call with target, timeframe, and invalidation

transcript_text: I am buying SOL around 150, target 220 over the next 60 days, invalidated if it loses 130.
expected_behavior: one accepted SOL bullish call with entry, target, timeframe, invalidation

transcript_text: Bitcoin was trading around 96k today while traders waited for the next Fed decision.
Arthur Hayes says Ethereum could go to ten thousand dollars this cycle.
expected_behavior: not creator-owned; quote/third-party report must not become public-quality call

transcript_text: Solana is looking strong here, this could be huge.
expected_behavior: reject ambiguous or low-confidence only; no public-quality call

transcript_text: My guest today says Cardano can double by summer if liquidity returns, but that is his trade, not mine.
expected_behavior: guest call; not creator-owned; no public-quality call

transcript_text: Top analysts on Twitter are calling for XRP to hit five dollars, and several newsletters repeated the same forecast this morning.
Click the link near the description, dot your eyes on the chart, and this is not financial advice.
expected_behavior: reject weak subtitle false positive; LINK/NEAR/DOT are generic words here
notes: Covers weak/false-positive subtitle fragments and historical known bad extraction pattern.

transcript_text: I would avoid Dogecoin here; if DOGE loses 12 cents, the risk is a fast drop toward 8 cents over the next month.
notes: Covers bearish calls and risk-warning calls.

transcript_text: For my own portfolio I am cautious on Bitcoin below 90k, but I like Ethereum if it reclaims 4k with a target around 5k this quarter.
expected_behavior: two creator-owned calls: BTC cautious/bearish and ETH bullish
notes: Covers multi-asset snippets and historical known good style.
